#  Submit an RFI for a Portfolio Financials Project 
#####  Legacy
This article is for Vendors submitting an RFI through a Bid Room in Procore's **Portfolio Financials** application.
##  Background 
If you have been invited to bid through Procore's Portfolio Financials application, you will submit your bid through the _Bid Room._ The Bid Room is a shared portal for those involved in the bidding process where all documentation, communication, and bid submissions is stored and accessible through Procore. If you need to submit an RFI, you can post it on the RFIs page of the Bid Room.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Vendor' access to the relevant Bid Room.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * As soon as a response is posted for your RFI, you will be sent an email notification that includes the original question, the response, and a link to the Bid Room in Procore.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Bid Room**.
  2. Click **RFIs**.  
  
![Rfis](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6db72790feebd3804ab613f78f00cfba/e03afd071501613a0bd7152ab14fbbb3/rfis.png?fm=webp)  

  3. _Optional:_ Enter a reference number in the **Ref #** field.
  4. Enter your RFI question in the **Question** text box.
  5. _Optional:_ Click **Attach Documents** to attach any relevant files.
  6. When you are ready to submit your RFI, click **Post Question**.   
_Note:_ All members of the project team will receive an email notification, and they can assign the question to the appropriate contact. When a response is posted, you will be notified by email.


## See Also
  * [Submit a Bid for a Portfolio Financials Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/submit-a-bid-for-a-portfolio-financials-project)
  * [Add a Bidding Team Contact to a Bid Room for a Portfolio Financials Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/add-a-bidding-team-contact-to-a-bid-room-for-a-portfolio-financials-project)
  * [Decline an Invitation to Bid for a Portfolio Financials Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/decline-an-invitation-to-bid-for-a-portfolio-financials-project)
title: Submit an RFI for a Portfolio Financials Project
description: How to submit an RFI in the Bid Room in Procore's Portfolio Financials application.
